QueryExtension.SQL: SELECT DISTINCT CPR.CASE_NUMBER AS "CPR.CASE_NUMBER", CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO", CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE", CPR.DEFT_DATE_OF_SERVICE AS "CPR.DEFT_DATE_OF_SERVICE", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM CASE_EVENTS CE1 WHERE CE1.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND CE1.STD_EVENT_ID = '38' AND CE1.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CE1.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CE1.DELETED_FLAG != 'Y') AS "CE.ACK_EXISTS" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE IN ('DEFENDANT' , 'PT 20 DEF') AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER like ${param.caseNumber}
